001/**
002 * Game class - the main engine of the text adventure "Henriette's Feast".
003 * It sets up the snowy village, creates all the rooms and their exits,
004 * then runs the game loop where Grandma Henriette moves around the village
005 * to gather everything she needs for the Christmas dinner.
006 *
007 * @author Raphaël Quillaud
008 */
009
010public class Game {
011    private UserInterface aGui;
012    private GameEngine aEngine;
013
014    /**
015     * Creates the game, initializes the rooms and the parser,
016     * then starts the game loop.
017     */
018    public Game() {
019        this.aEngine = new GameEngine();
020        this.aGui = new UserInterface(this.aEngine);
021        this.aEngine.setGUI(this.aGui);
022    }
023
024    public static void main(String[] args) {
025        new Game();
026    }
027} // Game
